title: Solana Containerised Testbed v0.8.0: Dynamic Load System Identification
description: Version 0.8.0 extends the Solana Containerised Testbed with controlled dynamic-load experiments for throughput-channel system identification. The release includes steady-state baselines, upward step-response experiments, step-down recovery experiments, multi-step load profiles, and a low-frequency sine-approximation profile within the confirmed safe lambda range 32..128. It provides v0.8.0 experiment runners, preflight checks, run-level summarizers, aggregate summaries, artifact inventory, checksums, and dataset documentation. The resulting dataset supports initial modelling of the u_cmd(t) -> u_ach(t) throughput channel. Latency-constrained modelling is deferred because lat_p99 is missing in the current collect_csv outputs.
